problems.name: Systemic lupus erythematosus, active
problems.diagnosedBy: Dr. Jessica Tanaka, Rheumatology (initial UCTD 4/10/2026; SLE per 2019 EULAR/ACR criteria 11/9/2026)
problems.notes: Active multi-system disease. Treatment: hydroxychloroquine, mycophenolate mofetil, prednisone (variable doses).

problems.name: Oropharyngeal dysphagia
problems.diagnosedBy: First reported 12/22/2026 by Dr. Williams (PCP); MBSS confirmed 2/9/2027
problems.notes: Onset late 2026 with bolus dysphagia of dry foods; progressed to severe oropharyngeal dysphagia with aspiration risk by 2/8/2027 ED visit.

problems.name: Severe unintentional weight loss
problems.notes: Weight trajectory: 50.8 kg (1/12/2026 baseline) -> 46.4 kg (4/2026) -> 43.8 kg (11/4/2026 ED) -> 41.2 kg (2/8/2027 ED) -> 35.4 kg (3/15/2027 admission). BMI at admission 15.7.

problems.name: Alopecia, diffuse non-scarring
problems.notes: Progressive diffuse hair shedding documented across multiple visits.

problems.name: Pancytopenia
problems.notes: Tri-lineage cytopenia documented across multiple visits 2026-2027.

problems.name: Depression, moderate
problems.notes: PHQ-9 elevated; engaged with Esperanza Behavioral Health (Spanish-speaking therapy).

problems.name: Loss of health insurance coverage
problems.notes: Maryland Medicaid lost 2020; multiple appeals through 2026-2027.

problems.name: Medication non-adherence due to access barriers
problems.notes: Adherence cycle driven by insurance and cost barriers. HCQ lapse 8/12-9/24/2026; MMF lapse beginning 3/9/2027.
